self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can now tighten one concrete next-step legality seam in Discovery-route resolution without broadening into the rest of negative-path hardening.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adopted slice narrows legality hardening to concrete required-next-artifact mismatches while preserving descriptive labels as metadata only.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, route-level legality relied on queue mismatches and missing linked artifacts, but not on required-next-artifact mismatches.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The resolver and composition checker will block this mismatch class and report it explicitly.

decision.rationale: The slice is small, shared, and directly aligned with the current whole-product bottleneck.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
